page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.36xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 144 dedicated physical cores using the Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor running at a clock speed of 3.4 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 144 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating hyperthreading resource sharing.

The instance is equipped with 1536.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 10.67 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring reliance on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

This hardware profile offers high resource density for memory-intensive workloads, though the lack of local storage and GPU accelerators limits its use in direct storage-heavy or hardware-accelerated machine learning tasks. The dedicated core allocation provides predictable compute performance. It is designed for workloads such as large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-heavy data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.36xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance featuring 144 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 6982P-C processors running at 3.4 GHz. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, the instance provides 144 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 1536.0 GB of RAM, offering a high memory-to-core ratio of 10.67 GB. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, meaning all storage operations rely on external network-attached volumes. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. The absence of complimentary public IPv4 addresses requires external network configuration for public access. This configuration is engineered for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large-scale in-memory databases, and complex data processing workloads that require predictable CPU performance and substantial memory capacity.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfr9i.36xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 144 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 1536 GB RAM, 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, and no local storage.

tagline: A dedicated core, memory-optimized instance featuring high-capacity RAM and baseline sixty-four gigabit network bandwidth for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 144 dedicated physical Intel Xeon cores with no hyperthreading.
1536 GB of system memory providing 10.67 GB per core.
No local storage or GPU accelerators included.
Designed for in-memory databases and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
